# Queries for the ZTSJobStatus table

For information on using these queries in the Azure portal, see [Log Analytics tutorial](/azure/azure-monitor/logs/log-analytics-tutorial). For the REST API, see [Query](/azure/azure-monitor/logs/api/overview).

### View workspace connectivity issues

Lists job status logs reporting workspace connectivity failures (full or partial), ordered by time.

```query
ZTSJobStatus
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where JobErrorCode in ("NoWorkspaceConnectivity", "PartialWorkspaceConnectivity")
| order by TimeGenerated desc
```
